description: 240-query router classification evaluation set -- 80 per class (sql / text / hybrid). Evaluated via decompose_with_zeroshot() + route_from_subtasks(). Difficulty reflects how semantically ambiguous the query is for an LLM classifier.

test_cases.query: How many customer orders were placed in January?
test_cases.description: Straightforward COUNT with date filter. 'customers' and 'orders' both hit SQL_KEYWORDS.

test_cases.query: What is the total revenue from all product lines?
test_cases.description: SUM aggregation over product lines. 'total' and 'revenue' both trigger SQL route.

test_cases.query: Show me the average order value grouped by region.
test_cases.description: AVG with GROUP BY. 'average' and 'order' are both SQL keywords.

test_cases.query: Count the active customers in each country.
test_cases.description: 'Count' as the first token and 'customers' both match SQL_KEYWORDS exactly.

test_cases.query: What is the sum of all invoices for premium accounts this quarter?
test_cases.description: Aggregate SUM. 'sum' token matches SQL_KEYWORDS.

test_cases.query: List all customers who placed orders worth over five hundred dollars.
test_cases.description: Filtered SELECT. Both 'customers' and 'orders' hit SQL_KEYWORDS.

test_cases.query: How much revenue did each product category generate last year?
test_cases.description: Revenue breakdown by category. 'revenue' triggers SQL route.

test_cases.query: How many rows are in the transactions table right now?
test_cases.description: Row-count query. 'table' is an SQL keyword.

test_cases.query: What is the average number of orders per customer in 2023?
test_cases.description: Multiple SQL keywords; classic aggregation query.

test_cases.query: What is the avg transaction size across all database records?
test_cases.description: 'avg' (abbreviation) and 'database' both hit SQL_KEYWORDS.

test_cases.query: Which customer accounts have the highest lifetime spending?
test_cases.description: Only one SQL keyword ('customer'). Still classified sql, but weaker signal.

test_cases.query: Show total sales broken down by sales representative for Q3.
test_cases.description: Aggregation by rep. 'total' triggers sql; no text keywords present.

test_cases.query: How much did revenue grow quarter over quarter in 2023?
test_cases.description: Time-series comparison. 'revenue' is the only keyword trigger.

test_cases.query: What SQL query would return all orders placed before noon today?
test_cases.description: Explicitly mentions 'SQL' in the query. Easy for keyword router.

test_cases.query: Which departments spent the most on vendor contracts last quarter?
test_cases.description: Aggregation + ranking over structured data, but no SQL keyword matches. Keyword router defaults to 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Who are the top five best-performing sales representatives this year?
test_cases.description: Ranking query; no SQL keyword triggers. Keyword router defaults to 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: What percentage of projects were delivered on time last quarter?
test_cases.description: Percentage calculation over structured data. No keyword matches; defaults to 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Which product categories are trending downward in units sold?
test_cases.description: Trend analysis over structured data. No SQL keywords; keyword router fails.

test_cases.query: How do employee satisfaction scores vary across office locations?
test_cases.description: Aggregation without any keyword matches. Defaults to 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Rank all store branches by net profit margin for the past fiscal year.
test_cases.description: ORDER BY profit margin — pure SQL. No keyword triggers at all; keyword router fails.

test_cases.query: Count the number of open invoices in the billing system.
test_cases.description: 'count' triggers SQL route directly. Clear structured-data intent.

test_cases.query: What is the total revenue generated by the enterprise segment this quarter?
test_cases.description: 'total' and 'revenue' both hit SQL_KEYWORDS. Unambiguous aggregation query.

test_cases.query: How many customer records have a missing phone number?
test_cases.description: 'customer' triggers SQL; data-quality COUNT query over a structured table.

test_cases.query: What is the average order fulfillment time in days?
test_cases.description: 'average' and 'order' both hit SQL_KEYWORDS. Classic AVG query.

test_cases.query: Show the sum of all refunds processed in the last thirty days.
test_cases.description: 'sum' is a direct SQL keyword. Clear aggregate over a transactions table.

test_cases.query: How many database entries were inserted yesterday?
test_cases.description: 'database' hits SQL_KEYWORDS. Row insertion count query.

test_cases.query: What is the avg number of items per customer order this month?
test_cases.description: 'avg', 'customer', and 'order' all match SQL_KEYWORDS. Strong multi-keyword signal.

test_cases.query: List all orders placed by customers in the premium tier last week.
test_cases.description: 'orders' and 'customers' both hit SQL_KEYWORDS.

test_cases.query: What is the total count of transactions flagged for fraud review?
test_cases.description: 'total' and 'count' both trigger SQL route.

test_cases.query: Show the revenue contribution of each sales channel for Q1.
test_cases.description: 'revenue' triggers SQL. Channel-level aggregation query.

test_cases.query: Which distribution centers had the highest throughput last month?
test_cases.description: No SQL keywords present. Keyword router fails; LLM must infer structured-data intent from 'throughput'.

test_cases.query: How has the average contract renewal rate changed year over year?
test_cases.description: 'average' is the only keyword trigger. Weak signal but LLM classifies correctly.

test_cases.query: Identify the sales agents who exceeded their quota in every quarter.
test_cases.description: No keyword hits. Requires LLM to recognise quota tracking as structured-data analytics.

test_cases.query: What fraction of enterprise accounts are currently on an annual plan?
test_cases.description: Proportion query over structured account data. No SQL keyword present.

test_cases.query: Show monthly active users broken down by device type.
test_cases.description: No keyword match. 'monthly active users' implies a metrics/telemetry table query.

test_cases.query: Which payment gateways have the highest transaction failure rate?
test_cases.description: No SQL keyword. Requires semantic understanding that failure rate is computed from a transactions table.

test_cases.query: What is the cohort-based retention curve for users acquired in Q1?
test_cases.description: Advanced cohort analytics; no keyword triggers. Keyword router defaults to 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Which departments are consistently over budget on headcount?
test_cases.description: Budget variance analysis over structured HR data. No keyword matches; LLM must infer intent.

test_cases.query: Identify underperforming product lines based on gross margin trends.
test_cases.description: Trend analysis requiring financial tables. No keyword triggers; pure semantic routing.

test_cases.query: Map the correlation between marketing spend and lead conversion velocity.
test_cases.description: Statistical correlation over two structured tables. No SQL keywords; keyword router fails completely.

test_cases.query: Summarize the key points in the annual report.
test_cases.description: Explicit summarization of a document. Both text keywords match.

test_cases.query: What does the company policy say about overtime and remote work?
test_cases.description: Policy lookup. 'policy' triggers text route.

test_cases.query: Explain the architecture described in the design document.
test_cases.description: Explanation from a document. 'explain' and 'document' both trigger text.

test_cases.query: Give me the context around the regulatory changes announced last month.
test_cases.description: 'context' is an explicit text keyword.

test_cases.query: What does the PDF file contain about the new onboarding process?
test_cases.description: PDF retrieval. 'pdf' and 'file' both hit text keywords.

test_cases.query: Provide a summary of the strategic roadmap presented in the deck.
test_cases.description: 'summary' triggers text route.

test_cases.query: Explain what the text mentions about machine learning best practices.
test_cases.description: 'explain' and 'text' both match text keywords.

test_cases.query: What does the GDPR policy document state about data retention?
test_cases.description: Compliance document lookup. Two text keywords trigger.

test_cases.query: What does the report say about the average employee tenure at the company?
test_cases.description: Text query with 'average' (SQL keyword) and 'report' (text keyword). Keyword router predicts hybrid — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Explain the total cost breakdown discussed in the proposal document.
test_cases.description: 'total' is SQL keyword; 'explain' and 'document' are text keywords. Keyword router predicts hybrid — WRONG.

test_cases.query: What customer feedback is documented in the user research report?
test_cases.description: 'customer' hits SQL, 'document'+'report' hit text. Predicted hybrid — actually a pure text retrieval.

test_cases.query: Summarize the revenue trends discussed in the annual strategy document.
test_cases.description: 'revenue' triggers SQL; 'summarize'+'document' trigger text. Answer lies in a document, not a DB table.

test_cases.query: What does the context file say about order processing workflows?
test_cases.description: 'order' is SQL; 'context'+'file' are text. The answer is from a document, not a DB.

test_cases.query: What does the summary document reveal about database performance bottlenecks?
test_cases.description: 'database' triggers SQL; 'summary'+'document' trigger text. Keyword router wrongly predicts hybrid.

test_cases.query: What innovations did the company introduce in 2023?
test_cases.description: No keywords present; defaults to 'text' which is correct.

test_cases.query: Describe the founding story and mission of the organization.
test_cases.description: Pure narrative question. No keyword matches; defaults to 'text' correctly.

test_cases.query: What was discussed in the executive board meeting last quarter?
test_cases.description: Meeting notes retrieval. No keywords; defaults to 'text'.

test_cases.query: Tell me about the company's approach to environmental sustainability.
test_cases.description: Open-ended conceptual question. No keywords; correct default.

test_cases.query: What are the key themes in the company mission statement?
test_cases.description: Document comprehension. No triggers; defaults to text correctly.

test_cases.query: Who were the key contributors to the product redesign initiative?
test_cases.description: Personnel/narrative lookup. No keywords; defaults to text.

test_cases.query: What does the HR policy document describe about vacation accrual?
test_cases.description: 'policy' and 'document' both trigger text route. Unambiguous document retrieval.

test_cases.query: Summarize the key findings in the market research report.
test_cases.description: 'summarize' and 'report' both hit text keywords.

test_cases.query: Explain the deployment process described in the technical runbook document.
test_cases.description: 'explain' and 'document' both hit text keywords.

test_cases.query: What does the context file reveal about the product vision?
test_cases.description: 'context' and 'file' both match text keywords.

test_cases.query: Provide a summary of the legal terms outlined in the master service agreement.
test_cases.description: 'summary' triggers text route. Document comprehension over a legal agreement.

test_cases.query: What does the PDF document say about the warranty and return conditions?
test_cases.description: 'pdf' and 'document' both hit text keywords.

test_cases.query: What does the policy manual state about data privacy obligations?
test_cases.description: 'policy' is a direct text keyword.

test_cases.query: Explain the incident response procedures documented in the security playbook.
test_cases.description: 'explain' hits text keyword. Procedure extraction from a document.

test_cases.query: What does the annual report text say about corporate governance?
test_cases.description: 'report' and 'text' both hit text keywords.

test_cases.query: Give me context from the release notes about the new authentication feature.
test_cases.description: 'context' triggers text route. Document-grounded feature description.

test_cases.query: What does the report indicate about the average customer satisfaction score?
test_cases.description: 'report' (text) conflicts with 'average' and 'customer' (SQL). LLM may incorrectly route to sql — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Summarize the total investment thesis described in the fund strategy document.
test_cases.description: 'summarize'+'document' (text) conflict with 'total' (SQL). Answer is in a document.

test_cases.query: What does the context file say about order processing delays?
test_cases.description: 'context'+'file' (text) conflict with 'order' (SQL). Document-grounded answer.

test_cases.query: Explain the revenue sharing model documented in the partnership agreement.
test_cases.description: 'explain' (text) conflicts with 'revenue' (SQL). Answer lies in a legal document.

test_cases.query: What does the summary document say about database performance improvements?
test_cases.description: 'summary'+'document' (text) conflict with 'database' (SQL). Pure text retrieval.

test_cases.query: What customer service philosophy is described in the brand guidelines?
test_cases.description: 'customer' (SQL) present but answer is from a brand guidelines document. LLM must recognise document intent.

test_cases.query: What does the report say about average transaction processing delays?
test_cases.description: 'report' (text) conflicts with 'average' (SQL). The analysis is documented, not computed live.

test_cases.query: What were the main conclusions from the executive strategy retreat?
test_cases.description: No text keywords present. Keyword router defaults to 'text' which is correct, but only by chance; LLM must reason from context.

test_cases.query: What does the company believe about its competitive differentiation?
test_cases.description: No keyword matches. Open-ended organisational question requiring document retrieval.

test_cases.query: What milestones are planned for the product roadmap over the next two years?
test_cases.description: No text or SQL keywords. Roadmap is stored in documents; LLM must infer text retrieval intent.

test_cases.query: How many customer orders were placed last month and what does the return policy say?
test_cases.description: Clear split: COUNT query + policy document lookup. Both keyword sets fire → hybrid correctly predicted.

test_cases.query: What is the total revenue for Q3 and can you summarize the investor report?
test_cases.description: Revenue aggregation + document summary. Four keyword hits across both sets.

test_cases.query: Count active users by plan and explain the subscription tiers from the pricing document.
test_cases.description: 'count' hits SQL; 'explain'+'document' hit text. Both pipelines needed.

test_cases.query: Show the average order value per segment and describe the segmentation policy.
test_cases.description: AVG aggregation + policy retrieval. Keyword router correctly picks hybrid.

test_cases.query: Which customers have the highest total spend and what does the loyalty program document say about tiers?
test_cases.description: Structured ranking + document policy. Both keyword types triggered.

test_cases.query: What is the sum of sales by region and please summarize the regional expansion strategy?
test_cases.description: SUM aggregation + summarization. 'sum' hits SQL; 'summarize' hits text.

test_cases.query: Show revenue breakdown by product and explain the pricing policy.
test_cases.description: Revenue query + policy explanation. Clear hybrid with both keyword sets.

test_cases.query: Show a database summary of user counts and give the context from the onboarding file.
test_cases.description: 'database' triggers SQL; 'summary','context','file' trigger text.

test_cases.query: How many total employees are in each department and what does the HR handbook say about benefits?
test_cases.description: Requires both structured headcount data and HR document. 'total' hits SQL but no text keyword. Keyword router predicts 'sql' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: What are the top customer segments by order volume and what marketing strategies are described in the playbook?
test_cases.description: 'customer'+'order' hit SQL but no text keywords. Keyword router predicts 'sql'; needs text for playbook — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Show average transaction value by channel and what acquisition strategy is outlined in the growth document.
test_cases.description: Single SQL keyword and single text keyword. Keyword router correctly predicts hybrid here.

test_cases.query: Explain the onboarding process described in the guide and also show how many new hires joined per quarter.
test_cases.description: Text keyword 'explain' fires; no SQL keyword. 'how many new hires per quarter' is SQL intent but 'quarter' isn't a keyword. Predicted 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Summarize the compliance report and tell me how many violations were logged this year.
test_cases.description: 'summarize'+'report' hit text; no SQL keyword for the COUNT part. Keyword router predicts 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: What context does the SLA file provide and how many tickets were escalated last week?
test_cases.description: Two text keywords fire; 'how many tickets escalated' is SQL intent but 'tickets' isn't a keyword. Predicted 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Which geographic regions have the lowest retention rates and what strategies are recommended in the retention playbook?
test_cases.description: No keywords at all. Defaults to 'text' — WRONG. Both structured data (retention rates) and document (playbook) are needed.

test_cases.query: Who generated the most sales last quarter and what commission guidelines apply to top performers?
test_cases.description: No keyword matches. Pure hybrid intent requiring DB ranking + document retrieval; keyword router fails.

test_cases.query: Which warehouses have critically low stock levels and what does the replenishment procedure specify?
test_cases.description: Inventory threshold query (SQL) + procedure document (text). No keywords trigger; defaults to 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Compare employee performance ratings across teams and summarize what the performance review guidelines recommend.
test_cases.description: 'summarize' fires one text keyword; no SQL keyword. Structured comparison is SQL intent but missed. Predicted 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Which marketing campaigns drove the highest conversion rates and what does the brand guidelines document say?
test_cases.description: 'document' fires one text keyword; no SQL keyword for the analytics part. Keyword router predicts 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Show me user activity metrics for the past 90 days and explain the privacy implications from the policy.
test_cases.description: 'explain'+'policy' trigger text; no SQL keyword for the metrics part. Keyword router predicts 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: How many items are in the inventory database and what does the stock management policy specify?
test_cases.description: 'database' (SQL) + 'policy' (text). Both keyword sets fire correctly.

test_cases.query: What is the total headcount by department and can you summarize the org structure from the company document?
test_cases.description: 'total' (SQL) + 'summarize'+'document' (text). Clear hybrid with strong keyword signal.

test_cases.query: Count active users by subscription tier and explain the terms described in the service agreement document.
test_cases.description: 'count' (SQL) + 'explain'+'document' (text). Both pipelines triggered.

test_cases.query: What is the average revenue per user and what does the monetization strategy document describe?
test_cases.description: 'average'+'revenue' (SQL) + 'document' (text). Strong multi-keyword hybrid.

test_cases.query: Show the total orders by region and summarize the regional distribution strategy from the operations report.
test_cases.description: 'total'+'orders' (SQL) + 'summarize'+'report' (text). Both keyword sets fire.

test_cases.query: How many customer support cases were opened last week and what does the service level policy say about resolution times?
test_cases.description: 'customer' (SQL) + 'policy' (text). Hybrid intent is clear.

test_cases.query: What is the sum of marketing spend by channel and what strategy is described in the brand guidelines document?
test_cases.description: 'sum' (SQL) + 'document' (text). Classic structured aggregation + document retrieval.

test_cases.query: List the top customers by revenue and summarize what the customer success playbook says about retention.
test_cases.description: 'customers'+'revenue' (SQL) + 'summarize' (text). Both keyword types present.

test_cases.query: Which product categories are experiencing the highest churn and what retention strategies does the product guide document recommend?
test_cases.description: No SQL keyword for 'highest churn'; 'document' fires text. LLM must infer churn analysis requires structured data.

test_cases.query: Show employee headcount trends by business unit and explain the restructuring plan outlined in the reorganization document.
test_cases.description: No SQL keyword; 'explain'+'document' (text). LLM must route headcount trends to SQL.

test_cases.query: What is the average time-to-hire by department and what does the recruiting handbook specify about required interview stages?
test_cases.description: 'average' (SQL) only; no text keyword for 'recruiting handbook'. Medium ambiguity.

test_cases.query: How has the NPS score trended quarterly and what does the customer experience report say about improvement initiatives?
test_cases.description: No SQL keyword; 'report' (text). LLM must infer NPS trending requires a database query.

test_cases.query: Summarize the vendor performance report and show which vendors had the most delivery delays.
test_cases.description: 'summarize'+'report' (text) fire; no SQL keyword for delivery delay analysis. Keyword router predicts 'text' — WRONG.

test_cases.query: What does the context file describe about pricing tiers and how many users are on each tier?
test_cases.description: 'context'+'file' (text) fire; implicit COUNT for user tiers has no SQL keyword. Medium ambiguity.

test_cases.query: Which sales territories are showing declining pipeline and what does the sales enablement guide recommend?
test_cases.description: No keyword matches at all. LLM may route entirely to 'text' given the document reference, missing the SQL intent — WRONG.

test_cases.query: Which supplier contracts are approaching expiration and what does the vendor management policy specify about renewals?
test_cases.description: 'policy' (text); no SQL keyword for contract expiration analysis. Hard semantic disambiguation required.

test_cases.query: Which customer cohorts have the lowest lifetime retention and what does the customer lifecycle guide describe?
test_cases.description: No keywords at all. Both cohort analytics (SQL) and lifecycle guide (text) are required; pure semantic routing.

test_cases.query: Show attrition trends across departments and what does the talent strategy document recommend for retention?
test_cases.description: No SQL keyword; 'document' (text) fires. LLM must identify attrition trend analysis as SQL intent.

test_cases.query: Compare lead conversion rates by campaign type and summarize the campaign optimization framework from the marketing document.
test_cases.description: No SQL keyword for the analytics part; 'summarize'+'document' (text) fire. Mixed-intent without explicit SQL signal.

test_cases.query: Which store formats are most profitable per square foot and what retail strategy is described in the expansion document?
test_cases.description: No SQL keyword; 'document' (text) fires. Profitability-per-unit analysis requires structured data; LLM must infer.

test_cases.description: 'count' directly triggers SQL route. Clear aggregation over a transactions table.

test_cases.description: 'total' and 'revenue' both hit SQL_KEYWORDS. Affiliate-level aggregation.
